profile_backed_target.source: fresh restored-source linalg profile after pass164

lever.summary: Route the 2048-sized packed-B GEMM to the existing full-k single-sweep packed path instead of the KC-blocked C-carry path

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Both routes own disjoint output rows and accumulate each output element over k in ascending order; the candidate only changed whether the existing flat packed full-k path or KC-blocked path was selected.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking behavior in matmul_2d.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No FMA insertion, mixed precision, horizontal reduction, or reassociation per output element; focused bit-identity tests cover packed, threaded, large, blocked, and golden digest paths.

validation.test_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-c3pgz-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.test_result: candidate passed: 9 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored, 1165 filtered out

benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-c3pgz-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10
benchmark.after_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-c3pgz-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

decision.reason: The full-k single-sweep gate regressed the same-worker target from 100.57 ms median to 105.24 ms median. Source was restored.
decision.next_primitive: Stop threshold-style full-k routing for GEMM2048. The next GEMM swing should be a behavior-contract bead for FP-tolerant recursive or Strassen-style GEMM, or a fresh profile-backed pivot to the next linalg row if GEMM no longer dominates.
